scripts.build: if [ ! -d "flutter" ]; then curl https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/stable/linux/flutter_linux_3.24.0-stable.tar.xz -o flutter.tar.xz && tar xf flutter.tar.xz; fi && git config --global --add safe.directory "$(pwd)/flutter" && export PATH="$PATH:$(pwd)/flutter/bin" && flutter config --enable-web && flutter build web
